svg.text: Arduino Pro Micro – DMX Relay Wiring Diagram
8-channel relay controller with I²C LCD, 4 buttons, and DMX512 input via MAX485
• Relay module: RELAY_ACTIVE_LOW = true → IN pin LOW turns relay ON
• MAX485: tie RE and DE pins to GND for permanent receive mode
• Buttons use internal pull-ups; press = connect pin to GND
• I²C LCD default address 0x27 (change in code if 0x3F)
• Recommended wire gauge: 22 AWG signal, 18 AWG power / relay load
• JD-VCC: power relay coils from separate 5 V supply to protect the MCU
• DMX cable: use shielded twisted-pair; shield connects to XLR pin 1
